turns.user_message: My chest feels tight and my stomach is in knots today. It's just this constant low-level unease.
That tight feeling in my chest hasn't gone away for weeks now. It flares up even when nothing is happening.
The knots in my stomach and the pressure in my chest are overwhelming everything. I feel physically trapped by my own body.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
